---
title: "KIND interview practice resources"
date: 2026-05-27
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Here are some sample interview questions cobbled together from various public sources. Most of them are public-sector (and health and social-care) oriented:

::: {.panel-tabset}


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(DT)

qqs <- readr::read_csv("data/interview_qbank.csv")

areas <- qqs$Area |>
  unique() |>
  sort()

q_type <- function(area){
  cat(paste("  \n##", area, "  \n", area, "questions  \n"))

  qqs |>
    filter(Area == area) |>
    knitr::kable() |>
    print()
}

purrr::walk(areas, q_type)

```


:::
